untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of: (1) lower timeframe pullback symmetry pattern recognition - not available as direct indicator; (2) 'reduced conviction in taking liquidity from the book' - requires order flow/volume profile analysis beyond available indicators; (3) comparison of pullback range to prior trend leg range - requires multi-leg pattern memory/state tracking. These pattern-recognition and order-flow elements cannot be expressed using only the allowed point-in-time indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy: Used ADX > 25 for confirmed trend, reduced range vs ATR for smaller pullback ranges, and volume < vol_ratio for reduced conviction. However, the core signal requirement around symmetry pattern detection and liquidity-taking conviction cannot be reliably captured without order flow data or pattern-matching capabilities.
